entries.name: Single Cell Portal
entries.desc: Reducing barriers and accelerating single-cell research.

entries.name: UCSC Cell Browser
entries.desc: Published datasets as tracks and a new data exploration tool for single-cell data.

entries.name: CZ CellxGene
entries.desc: Fast, easy access to the largest collection of standardized single-cell data — 50M+ cells and growing.

entries.name: PanglaoDB
entries.desc: Database for exploring single-cell RNA sequencing experiments from mouse and human.

entries.name: CellSTAR
entries.desc: Comprehensive annotated reference data for annotating hundreds of cell types, including tens of thousands of gene markers.

entries.name: Single Cell Atlas
entries.desc: Multi-omics atlas presenting a comprehensive overview of healthy human tissues with bioinformatics tools.

entries.name: ssREAD
entries.desc: Single-cell and spatial RNA-seq database for Alzheimer's Disease research.

entries.name: scRNASeqDB
entries.desc: Contains 36 human single-cell gene expression datasets from GEO, involving 8,910 cells from 174 cell groups.

entries.name: Cell Types Database
entries.desc: Characterizes cortical diversity at the cellular level for multiple neuroanatomical areas in mouse and human.

entries.name: PANCDB
entries.desc: Open-source data repository for the Human Pancreas Analysis Program, making genomic and islet function data accessible.

entries.name: Human Cell Atlas
entries.desc: International consortium mapping all cell types in the healthy body across time from development to adulthood.

entries.name: WebAtlas
entries.desc: Pipeline for user-friendly sharing and interactive navigation of integrated single-cell datasets.

entries.name: Talk2Data
entries.desc: Analytics hub for public single-cell and spatial data, built on a comprehensive database for in-depth large-scale research.

entries.name: HuBMAP
entries.desc: Open map of the human body at the cellular level, containing biomolecular data in genomics, proteomics and epigenetics.

entries.name: NeMO Archive
entries.desc: Neuroscience Multi-omic Archive focused on data from the BRAIN Initiative and SCORCH consortium.

entries.name: GutAtlas
entries.desc: Healthy reference atlas of the human GI tract with ~1.1M cells and 136 fine-grained cell states.

entries.name: Arc Virtual Cell Atlas
entries.desc: Includes observational and perturbational data from over 300 million cells.

entries.name: Single Cell Omics
entries.desc: Curated list of databases with access to published single-cell datasets for exploration and download.

entries.name: Epimap
entries.desc: Aggregated 3,030 references from ENCODE, Roadmap, and GGR; imputed 14,952 datasets across 859 biosamples.

entries.name: 3DIV
entries.desc: Long-range chromatin interaction maps centered on 18,943 promoters in 27 human cell/tissue types.

entries.name: ABC Model
entries.desc: Activity-by-Contact model predicts which enhancers regulate which genes based on epigenomic datasets.

entries.name: HuBMAP
entries.desc: Open map of the human body at the cellular level, containing biomolecular data in genomics, proteomics and epigenetics.

entries.name: NeMO Archive
entries.desc: Neuroscience Multi-omic Archive focused on data from the BRAIN Initiative and SCORCH consortium.

entries.name: PRIDE
entries.desc: World's largest data repository of mass spectrometry-based proteomics data.

entries.name: ProteomeXchange
entries.desc: Globally coordinated data submission and dissemination pipelines for major proteomics repositories.

entries.name: PeptideAtlas
entries.desc: Multi-organism compendium of peptides identified in large-scale tandem mass spectrometry experiments.

entries.name: MassIVE
entries.desc: NIH-funded community resource for the global, free exchange of mass spectrometry data.

entries.name: jPOSTrepo
entries.desc: Japan ProteOme STandard Repository for sharing MS raw and processed data.

entries.name: Panorama Public
entries.desc: Server-based data repository for targeted mass spectrometry assays integrating into Skyline workflows.

entries.name: CHO Proteome Database
entries.desc: Hosts proteomic data generated from CHO cell lines.

entries.name: Human Liver Proteome Database
entries.desc: Quantitative protein data across hepatocytes, sinusoidal endothelial cells, hepatic stellate cells, and Kupffer cells.

entries.name: Human Plasma Proteome Project
entries.desc: Combines results from labs worldwide working on the human plasma proteome.

entries.name: Human Protein Atlas
entries.desc: Maps all human proteins in cells, tissues, and organs using antibody imaging, mass spectrometry, and transcriptomics.

entries.name: Human Skin Atlas
entries.desc: Mass spectrometry-based proteome data from healthy and diseased skin for translational skin research.

entries.name: Lipid MAPS Proteome Database
entries.desc: Lipid-related genes and proteins for over 8,500 genes and 12,500 proteins across 10 species.

entries.name: MitoProteome
entries.desc: Mitochondrial gene/protein sequence database and annotation system with 847+ human mitochondrial proteins.

entries.name: Proteomic Data Commons
entries.desc: NCI's largest public repository of proteogenomic comprehensive tumor datasets.

entries.name: PASSEL
entries.desc: Enables cross-analysis of SRM data, supports optimization of data collection, and facilitates data review.

entries.name: Protein Information Resource
entries.desc: Quickly retrieves all occurrences of a query peptide from UniProtKB with isoforms.

entries.name: TopFIND
entries.desc: Analysis platform focused on protein termini, their origin, modification and role in protein structure and function.

entries.name: HuBMAP
entries.desc: Open map of the human body at the cellular level, containing biomolecular data in genomics, proteomics and epigenetics.

entries.name: UniProt
entries.desc: Comprehensive resource for protein sequence and annotation data.

entries.name: MassIVE
entries.desc: NIH-funded community resource for the global, free exchange of mass spectrometry data.

entries.name: MetaboLights
entries.desc: Cross-species database for metabolomics experiments and derived information.

entries.name: BMRB Metabolomics
entries.desc: Archives spectral and quantitative NMR data derived from investigations of biological macromolecules and metabolites.

entries.name: Birmingham Metabolite Library
entries.desc: Collection of 3,328 experimental 1D and 2D J-resolved NMR spectra of 208 metabolite standards.

entries.name: Human Metabolome Database
entries.desc: Freely available database containing detailed information about small molecule metabolites found in the human body.

entries.name: MassBank
entries.desc: One of the largest open databases of mass spectral data, covering numerous different instrument types.

entries.name: MassBank of North America
entries.desc: Metadata-centric, auto-curating repository for efficient storage and querying of mass spectral records.

entries.name: XCMS-Metlin
entries.desc: Largest repository of MS/MS information that connects empirical data with molecular structure.

entries.name: MZCloud
entries.desc: Web-based mass spectral database of high and low resolution tandem mass spectra acquired under multiple experimental conditions.

entries.name: MetaCyc
entries.desc: Curated database of experimentally elucidated metabolic pathways from all domains of life.

entries.name: HuMet
entries.desc: Enables exploration of dynamic metabolic responses to physiological challenges in healthy individuals.

entries.name: Metabolomics Workbench
entries.desc: National repository for metabolomics data, with analysis tools, metabolite standards, protocols, and training.

entries.name: Enteropathway
entries.desc: Metabolic pathway database integrating 3,269 compounds, 3,677 reactions, and 876 modules related to the human gut microbiota.

entries.name: exRNA Atlas
entries.desc: exRNA profiles derived from various biofluids and conditions, storing data from small RNA sequencing assays.

entries.name: LINCS
entries.desc: Catalogs gene expression changes when cells are exposed to various perturbing agents.

entries.name: GTEx Portal
entries.desc: Comprehensive public resource for tissue and cell-specific gene expression and regulation across individuals and species.

entries.name: HuBMAP
entries.desc: Open map of the human body at the cellular level, containing biomolecular data in genomics, proteomics and epigenetics.

entries.name: NeMO Archive
entries.desc: Neuroscience Multi-omic Archive focused on data from the BRAIN Initiative and SCORCH consortium.

entries.name: GDC
entries.desc: NCI's unified data repository enabling data sharing across cancer genomic studies in support of precision medicine.

entries.name: DrugMap
entries.desc: Maps drug-molecule information for 30,000+ drugs and candidates, tracking 5,000+ interacting molecules across body locations and disease sites.

entries.name: INTERVAL
entries.desc: Open-access resource on shared genetic etiology across transcriptional phenotypes, molecular traits and health outcomes in humans.

entries.name: Adipose Tissue Knowledge Portal
entries.desc: Open access to clinical, transcriptional and protein data in adipose tissue down to single-cell level.

entries.name: Common Metabolic Disease Knowledge Portal
entries.desc: Aggregates and displays human genetic and functional genomic information linked to common metabolic diseases and traits.
